rd.event.get_actions.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
include_markers (bool, 可选, 默认 true)
include_drawcalls (bool, 可选, 默认 true)
max_nodes (int, 可选, 默认 2000): 有界返回的最大事件节点数

rd.event.get_action_tree.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
max_depth (int, 可选)
filter (dict, 可选)
offset (int, 可选, 默认 0): 根节点分页偏移
limit (int, 可选, 默认 256): 根节点分页大小
max_nodes (int, 可选, 默认 2000): 整棵树返回的最大节点数

rd.capture.open_replay.description: 基于 capture_file_id 创建一个可回放的 Replay Session；若提供 options.remote_id，则必须严格走该 live remote handle 对应的 remote backend，不允许 silent local fallback。
rd.capture.open_replay.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {session_id, frame_count, api_properties}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null): 当 `options.remote_id` 缺失、失效、未连接、跨 context 复用或会导致 local fallback 时，显式返回 `remote_not_found` / `remote_not_connected` / `remote_handle_context_mismatch` 等错误
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

prerequisites.reason: Opening a replay always requires an opened capture handle.
Remote replay requires a live remote handle in options.remote_id.

rd.event.set_active.description: 设置当前 active event；成功后 runtime 与 context snapshot 必须同步到同一个 resolved event，失败时保持旧状态不变。

rd.pipeline.get_state.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
event_id (int, 可选): 缺省为当前 active event，并回传 resolved_event_id
detail_level (str, 可选, 默认 'full'): 'summary'|'full'
context_id (str, optional): choose the context to use; defaults to the current daemon context
runtime_owner (str, optional): live runtime owner id; when a context has a claimed owner, live tools must match it together with owner_lease_id
owner_lease_id (str, optional): owner lease id returned by rd.session.claim_runtime_owner; required for live tools when the context is claimed
baton_id (str, optional): runtime baton id for a resumed live investigation
rd.pipeline.get_state.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {pipeline_state, resolved_event_id}; `pipeline_state` 额外包含 `backend_type`、`summary_status`、`summary_degraded_reasons`、`binding_truth_level`、`visual_truth_level` 与 `evidence_truth_level`
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.pipeline.get_state_summary.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
event_id (int, 可选): 缺省为当前 active event，并回传 resolved_event_id
include_bindings (bool, 可选, 默认 true)
include_shaders (bool, 可选, 默认 true)
context_id (str, optional): choose the context to use; defaults to the current daemon context
runtime_owner (str, optional): live runtime owner id; when a context has a claimed owner, live tools must match it together with owner_lease_id
owner_lease_id (str, optional): owner lease id returned by rd.session.claim_runtime_owner; required for live tools when the context is claimed
baton_id (str, optional): runtime baton id for a resumed live investigation
rd.pipeline.get_state_summary.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {summary, resolved_event_id}; `summary` 额外包含 `summary_status`、`summary_degraded_reasons`、`binding_truth_level` 与 `evidence_truth_level`，用于区分 verified / partial / degraded state 摘要
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.pipeline.get_output_targets.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
event_id (int, 可选): 缺省为当前 active event，并回传 resolved_event_id
context_id (str, optional): choose the context to use; defaults to the current daemon context
runtime_owner (str, optional): live runtime owner id; when a context has a claimed owner, live tools must match it together with owner_lease_id
owner_lease_id (str, optional): owner lease id returned by rd.session.claim_runtime_owner; required for live tools when the context is claimed
baton_id (str, optional): runtime baton id for a resumed live investigation
rd.pipeline.get_output_targets.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {framebuffer, resolved_event_id}; `framebuffer` 额外包含 `summary_status`、`summary_degraded_reasons` 与 `binding_truth_level`，用于标记 visual_evidence_only / binding degraded 等 truth 状态
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.shader.get_reflection.description: 获取指定 shader 的反射信息；支持 `event_id + stage` 与 `event_id + stage + shader_id` 两种 event-bound 绑定方式，显式 `shader_id` 会优先参与身份校验。
rd.shader.get_reflection.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
shader_id (str, 可选): 若提供，则必须与请求 event/stage 当前绑定 shader identity 一致
stage (str, 可选): 若未提供 `shader_id`，则与 `event_id` 一起解析当前绑定 shader
event_id (int, 可选): 缺省为当前 active event
include_bindings (bool, 可选, 默认 true)
include_constant_blocks (bool, 可选, 默认 true)
context_id (str, optional): choose the context to use; defaults to the current daemon context
runtime_owner (str, optional): live runtime owner id; when a context has a claimed owner, live tools must match it together with owner_lease_id
owner_lease_id (str, optional): owner lease id returned by rd.session.claim_runtime_owner; required for live tools when the context is claimed
baton_id (str, optional): runtime baton id for a resumed live investigation
rd.shader.get_reflection.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {reflection, shader_id, resolved_event_id}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null): 绑定失败显式返回 `shader_binding_lookup_failed` / `shader_stage_mismatch` / `shader_reflection_unavailable`，不再把所有失败折叠成 `shader_not_bound`
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.shader.get_disassembly.description: 获取指定 shader 的反汇编/IR；event-bound shader 解析与 `rd.pipeline.get_shader`、`rd.export.shader_bundle`、`rd.shader.get_reflection`、`rd.shader.edit_and_replace` 使用同一套绑定逻辑。
rd.shader.get_disassembly.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {disassembly, target, source_encoding, is_raw_spirv_asm, source_hash, shader_id, resolved_event_id, edit_plan}
`edit_plan` describes shader_format, input_kind, can_edit_text, can_build, can_replace, requires_toolchain, build_input_kind, allowed_edit_inputs, allowed_ops, recommended_next_tool, and blocked_reason. DXIL/DXBC disassembly is read-only unless edit_plan reports a buildable source path.
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null): 绑定失败显式返回 `shader_binding_lookup_failed` / `shader_stage_mismatch`；当请求 target 不存在或源码不可取时，显式返回 `shader_disassembly_unavailable` 并带 `failure_stage` / `failure_reason`
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.shader.get_source.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {source, files, source_available, fallback_tool?, fallback_args?, edit_plan, failure_stage?, failure_reason?, shader_id, stage, resolved_event_id}; when original debug source is unavailable, returns ok=true with source_available=false and a format-aware fallback. SPIR-V may recommend `rd.shader.get_disassembly` with target='SPIR-V ASM' and source_encoding='spirvasm'; DXIL/DXBC recommends read-only disassembly and/or `rd.shader.extract_binary` instead of treating disassembly text as replacement source.
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.shader.edit_and_replace.description: 在当前 Replay Session 中替换 shader；支持 `event_id + stage` 与 `event_id + stage + shader_id` 两种入口，显式 `shader_id` 会优先作为绑定 identity 校验。
rd.shader.edit_and_replace.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {replacement_id, status='applied'|'noop', resolved_event_id, messages, edit_plan, replacement{edit_plan, compile{encoding, disassembly_target, entry_point, compile_flags}, artifacts{source_before, source_after, patch_diff}}}
artifacts (list): when `emit_patch_artifacts=true` or `output_dir` is provided, includes before/after/diff text artifacts
error (dict|null): capability/runtime 失败会显式区分 `validation_error`、`shader_patch_op_unsupported_for_encoding`、`shader_binding_lookup_failed`、`shader_stage_mismatch`、`shader_source_mismatch`、`shader_patch_diff_failed`、`shader_build_failed`、`shader_replace_backend_unsupported`、`shader_replace_failed`、`shader_replace_preserve_outputs_failed` 等错误；build 失败不会进入 ReplaceResource，unsupported DXIL/DXBC disassembly 会在 ReplaceResource 前返回结构化失败，preserve_outputs 失败会尝试回滚，并在 `error.details` 中带 `edit_plan` / `failure_stage` / `failure_reason` / `replacement_attempted` / `cleanup_attempted` / `expected_shader_id` / `bound_shader_id`
meta (dict)
projections (dict, optional)

rd.shader.debug_start.description: 启动 shader debugger（默认 pixel），在 remote replay 下会先读取 remote capability matrix；如果当前 backend/session 明确不支持 debug，则在创建 trace 前直接 truthful-fail。
rd.shader.debug_start.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
mode (str, 可选, 默认 'pixel'): 当前正式支持 `pixel`；传入其他 mode 会返回结构化 `validation_error`，并在 details 中附带 `supported_modes` / `requested_mode` / `failure_stage` / `failure_reason`
event_id (int, 可选): 缺省为当前 active event
params (dict): pixel 模式下使用 {x, y, sample?, target?, view?, primitive?}
timeout_ms (int, 可选, 默认 10000)
context_id (str, optional): choose the context to use; defaults to the current daemon context
runtime_owner (str, optional): live runtime owner id; when a context has a claimed owner, live tools must match it together with owner_lease_id
owner_lease_id (str, optional): owner lease id returned by rd.session.claim_runtime_owner; required for live tools when the context is claimed
baton_id (str, optional): runtime baton id for a resumed live investigation
rd.shader.debug_start.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {shader_debug_id, initial_state, resolved_context, resolved_event_id, pixel_history_summary, selected_target_source, failure_stage, failure_reason, attempts}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null): remote backend/session 明确不支持时，优先返回 capability-style 错误，而不是等到 trace 创建后才报 `debugger_handle_missing`
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.shader.compile.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {session_id, shader_id, entry, stage, source_encoding, supported_source_encodings, runtime_replacement_supported, runtime_replacement_reason, messages, compiler_messages, edit_plan, saved_path?, artifact_path?, byte_size?}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null): 当请求的 `source_encoding` 不被当前 replay backend 支持时，显式返回 `shader_compile_encoding_unsupported`，并附带 `supported_source_encodings`、`runtime_replacement_supported`、`runtime_replacement_reason` 与 `edit_plan`，把“compile 支持”与“runtime replacement 支持”分开表达；DXIL/DXBC 的字符串 `source` 输入不会被当作二进制容器提交
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.texture.get_data.parameter_raw:
session_id (str)
texture_id (str): 纹理资源 ID
event_id (int, 可选): 若提供则在该 event 上解析 texture/readback，并回传 resolved_event_id
subresource (dict, 可选): 包含 mip (int, 默认 0), slice (int, 默认 0), sample (int, 默认 0)
output_path (str, 可选): 若提供则必须使用 `.npz` 扩展名
as_base64 (bool, 可选): 同时返回 `.npz` 容器的 base64 文本
context_id (str, optional): choose the context to use; defaults to the current daemon context
runtime_owner (str, optional): live runtime owner id; when a context has a claimed owner, live tools must match it together with owner_lease_id
owner_lease_id (str, optional): owner lease id returned by rd.session.claim_runtime_owner; required for live tools when the context is claimed
baton_id (str, optional): runtime baton id for a resumed live investigation
rd.texture.get_data.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {artifact_path, saved_path, content_kind, container_format, stats, byte_size, resolved_event_id, texture_id, target_metadata, binding_truth_level, evidence_truth_level, summary_degraded_reasons, base64?}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null): `output_path` 不是 `.npz` 时显式返回 `texture_output_path_extension_mismatch`
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.export.screenshot.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): single export returns {artifact_path, saved_path, image_path, meta, resolved_event_id, selected_formats, requested_formats, recommended_formats, name_info, texture_format, chosen_output_slot, texture_id, target_source, binding_truth_level, visual_truth_level, evidence_truth_level, summary_degraded_reasons}; multi-format export returns {exports, saved_paths, image_paths, resolved_event_id, selected_formats, requested_formats, recommended_formats, name_info, texture_format, chosen_output_slot, texture_id, target_source, binding_truth_level, visual_truth_level, evidence_truth_level, summary_degraded_reasons}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.export.shader_bundle.description: 导出当前 event 相关 shader 的 bundle；event-bound shader 绑定与 `rd.pipeline.get_shader` / `rd.shader.get_disassembly` / `rd.shader.get_reflection` / `rd.shader.edit_and_replace` 保持一致。
rd.export.shader_bundle.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {output_dir, bundle_path, resolved_event_id}
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null): 当请求 event 没有可绑定 shader 时，显式返回 `shader_bundle_empty`
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.session.get_context.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {context_id, entry_mode, backend, runtime_parallelism_ceiling, session_locator, runtime, remote, focus, last_artifacts, current_session_id, sessions, recovery, limits, active_operation, recent_operations, runtime_owner, owner_lease, active_baton, rehydrate_status, updated_at_ms, remote_capability_matrix, remote_context_locality, remote_handle_origin_context, remote_handle_reuse_policy}; remote_capability_matrix is state-first for get_context and may report not_currently_probed for live shader/debug/replace capability probes
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
projections (dict, optional)

rd.core.get_capabilities.description: 获取当前环境能力详情；除 replay/remote/debug 基础项外，还会暴露当前 context/session/backend 视角下的 remote capability matrix。
rd.core.get_capabilities.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {capabilities}; `capabilities` 至少包含 replay / remote / shader_debug / shader_replace / shader_compile / counters / artifact_dir / context_id / current_session_id / current_backend，并在 remote 相关场景下附带 `remote_capability_matrix`
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
projections (dict, 可选)

rd.vfs.ls.parameter_raw:
path (str, 可选, 默认 '/'): VFS 路径
session_id (str, 可选): 当 path 指向 replay 相关域时用于解析当前 session
projection (dict, 可选): 当 kind='tabular' 时返回 entries 的表格化摘要，用于提高扫描效率，不表示语义重要度排序
rd.vfs.ls.returns_raw:
ok (bool)
data (dict): {path, node, entries}
projections.tabular (dict, 可选): {format_version, columns, rows, row_count, tsv_text?} as a tabular summary for scan/readability only, not semantic ranking
artifacts (list)
error (dict|null)
meta (dict)
